candidate.completion: lower your standards before my personality does.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards before my personality does.

evaluation.rationale: A clear self-deprecating turn with decent logic and a compact finish, but the pivot is more clever than inevitable and the line lacks the snap and polish of stronger quotable wit.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
